autoDiscover.title: Auto Discover Devices
autoDiscover.description: Automatically add every Aranet4 found during startup discovery. Leave disabled to manage only the serial numbers listed below.

devices.title: Configured Aranet4 Devices
devices.description: Aranet4 sensors explicitly enrolled by Bluetooth serial number.

co2AlertThreshold.title: CO2 Alert Threshold
co2AlertThreshold.description: When to consider that the CO2 level is too high, in ppm.

batteryAlertThreshold.title: Battery Alert Threshold
batteryAlertThreshold.description: When to consider that the battery is low, in percent.

sensorDataRefreshInterval.title: Sensor Data Refresh Interval
sensorDataRefreshInterval.description: How often to read the sensor, in seconds.

bluetoothReadyTimeout.title: Bluetooth Ready Timeout
bluetoothReadyTimeout.description: How long to wait for Bluetooth to be ready, in seconds.

bluetoothDeviceSearchTimeout.title: Bluetooth Device Search Timeout
bluetoothDeviceSearchTimeout.description: How long to scan for Aranet4 devices, in seconds.

showCo2PpmTile.title: Show CO2 ppm Tile
showCo2PpmTile.description: Adds a compatibility Light Sensor service named Aranet4 CO2 ppm so Homebridge UI shows the CO2 number on the Accessories page. Homebridge UI will label the rendered unit as lux; leave this off for native HomeKit CO2 only.

showAirQualitySensor.title: Show Air Quality Sensor
showAirQualitySensor.description: Adds an Air Quality Sensor service derived from CO2 ppm.
